# Implementation Templates

These templates define task-level execution context.

Instantiate when a concrete task is ready to execute:

- `TASK_EXECUTION_PACK.template.md` -> `docs/agents/implementation/tasks/<task>/TASK_EXECUTION_PACK.md`
- `AFFECTED_FILES_MAP.template.md` -> `docs/agents/implementation/tasks/<task>/AFFECTED_FILES_MAP.md`
- `TASK_RISK_CHECKLIST.template.md` -> `docs/agents/implementation/tasks/<task>/TASK_RISK_CHECKLIST.md`

Implementation artifacts are task-specific. They are not long-lived system truth.
